translations.idiomatic: In year six, eleventh month, Xiongnu entered Shang and Yunzhong commanderies; Han raised three armies to defend the capital.

sentences.zh: 其四月乙巳，水、木、火三合於東井。

translations.literal: On yimao day of fourth month, Mercury, Jupiter, and Mars conjoined at Eastern Well.
translations.idiomatic: On yimao day of fourth month, Mercury, Jupiter, and Mars conjoined at Eastern Well.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「外內有兵與喪，改立王公。

translations.literal: Divination said: "Inside and outside there are armies and mourning, with replacement of kings and nobles.
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "Inside and outside there are armies and mourning, with replacement of kings and nobles.

translations.literal: Eastern Well corresponds to Qin."
translations.idiomatic: Eastern Well corresponds to Qin."

sentences.zh: 八月，天狗下梁野，是歲誅反者周殷長安市。

translations.literal: In eighth month, Heavenly Dog fell in Liang territory; that year rebels Zhou Yin were executed at Chang'an market.
translations.idiomatic: In eighth month, Heavenly Dog fell in Liang territory; that year rebels Zhou Yin were executed at Chang'an market.

translations.literal: In seventh year sixth month, Emperor Wen died.
translations.idiomatic: In seventh year sixth month, Emperor Wen died.

sentences.zh: 其十一月戊戌，土、水合於危。

translations.literal: In eleventh month wuxu day, Saturn and Mercury conjoined at Wei.
translations.idiomatic: In eleventh month wuxu day, Saturn and Mercury conjoined at Wei.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「為雍沮，所當之國不可舉事用兵，必受其殃。

translations.literal: Divination said: "This means blockage and stagnation; the state concerned must not undertake affairs or military action, and will certainly suffer calamity.
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "This means blockage and stagnation; the state concerned must not undertake affairs or military action, and will certainly suffer calamity.

translations.literal: One interpretation says armies will be overturned.
translations.idiomatic: One interpretation says armies will be overturned.

translations.literal: Wei corresponds to Qi."
translations.idiomatic: Wei corresponds to Qi."

sentences.zh: 其七月，火東行，行畢陽，環畢東北，出而西，逆行至昴，即南乃東行。

translations.literal: In seventh month, Mars moved east through Bi's yang side, circled northeast of Bi, emerged and went west, retrograded to Mao, then turned south and moved east again.
translations.idiomatic: In seventh month, Mars moved east through Bi's yang side, circled northeast of Bi, emerged and went west, retrograded to Mao, then turned south and moved east again.

translations.literal: Divination said: "This means mourning, deaths, and invading disorder.
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "This means mourning, deaths, and invading disorder.

translations.literal: Bi and Mao correspond to Zhao."
translations.idiomatic: Bi and Mao correspond to Zhao."

sentences.zh: 三年，填星在婁，幾入，還居奎。

translations.literal: In year three, Saturn was in Lou, nearly entering, then returned to reside in Kui.
translations.idiomatic: In year three, Saturn was in Lou, nearly entering, then returned to reside in Kui.

translations.literal: Kui corresponds to Lu.
translations.idiomatic: Kui corresponds to Lu.

translations.literal: Divination said: "Its state gains land; this is called gaining Saturn."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "Its state gains land; this is called gaining Saturn."

translations.literal: That year Lu became a state.
translations.idiomatic: That year Lu became a state.

sentences.zh: 四年七月癸未，火入東井，行陰，又以九月己未入輿鬼，戊寅出。

translations.literal: In year four, seventh month guimei day, Mars entered Eastern Well and moved on the shaded track; then in ninth month jiwei day entered Carriage Ghosts and on wuyin day emerged.
translations.idiomatic: In year four, seventh month guimei day, Mars entered Eastern Well and moved on the shaded track; then in ninth month jiwei day entered Carriage Ghosts and on wuyin day emerged.

translations.literal: Divination said: "This means executions and also fire disaster."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "This means executions and also fire disaster."

translations.literal: Two years later, there was the Li clan affair.
translations.idiomatic: Two years later, there was the Li clan affair.

translations.literal: After that, the eastern tower of Weiyang suffered fire.
translations.idiomatic: After that, the eastern tower of Weiyang suffered fire.

sentences.zh: 中元年，填星當在觜觿、參，去居東井。

translations.literal: In Zhongyuan year one, Saturn should have been in Beak-and-Talon and Shen, but moved to Eastern Well.
translations.idiomatic: In Zhongyuan year one, Saturn should have been in Beak-and-Talon and Shen, but moved to Eastern Well.

translations.literal: Divination said: "Loss of territory, or else anxiety over women."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "Loss of territory, or else anxiety over women."

sentences.zh: 其三年正月丁亥，金、木合於觜觿，為白衣之會。

translations.literal: In year three, first month dinghai day, Venus and Jupiter conjoined at Beak-and-Talon, meaning assembly in white clothing.
translations.idiomatic: In year three, first month dinghai day, Venus and Jupiter conjoined at Beak-and-Talon, meaning assembly in white clothing.

sentences.zh: 三月丁酉，彗星夜見西北，色白，長丈，在觜觿，且去益小，十五日不見。

translations.literal: On dingyou day of third month, a comet appeared at night in northwest, white, one zhang long, at Beak-and-Talon, and as it moved away grew smaller, disappearing after fifteen days.
translations.idiomatic: On dingyou day of third month, a comet appeared at night in northwest, white, one zhang long, at Beak-and-Talon, and as it moved away grew smaller, disappearing after fifteen days.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「必有破國亂君，伏死其辜。

translations.literal: Divination said: "There must be state-breaking and ruler-disordering, with hidden death for crimes.
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "There must be state-breaking and ruler-disordering, with hidden death for crimes.

translations.literal: Beak-and-Talon corresponds to Liang."
translations.idiomatic: Beak-and-Talon corresponds to Liang."

sentences.zh: 其五月甲午，金、木俱在東井。

translations.literal: On jiamao day of fifth month, Venus and Jupiter were both at Eastern Well.
translations.idiomatic: On jiamao day of fifth month, Venus and Jupiter were both at Eastern Well.

sentences.zh: 戉，金去木留，守之二十日。

translations.literal: At Axe, Venus departed and Jupiter remained, guarding there for twenty days.
translations.idiomatic: At Axe, Venus departed and Jupiter remained, guarding there for twenty days.

translations.literal: Divination said: "Injury is completed at Axe.
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "Injury is completed at Axe.

sentences.zh: 木為諸侯，誅將行於諸侯也。」

translations.literal: Jupiter signifies feudal lords; executions will be carried out among feudal lords."
translations.idiomatic: Jupiter signifies feudal lords; executions will be carried out among feudal lords."

sentences.zh: 其六月壬戌，蓬星見西南，在房南，去房可二丈，大如二斗器，色白；

translations.literal: On renxu day of sixth month, a fluffy star appeared in southwest, south of Fang, about two zhang from Fang, as large as a two-dou vessel, white.
translations.idiomatic: On renxu day of sixth month, a fluffy star appeared in southwest, south of Fang, about two zhang from Fang, as large as a two-dou vessel, white.

sentences.zh: 癸亥，在心東北，可長丈所；

translations.literal: On guihai day it was northeast of Heart, about one zhang long.
translations.idiomatic: On guihai day it was northeast of Heart, about one zhang long.

translations.literal: On jiazi day it was north of Tail, about six zhang long.
translations.idiomatic: On jiazi day it was north of Tail, about six zhang long.

sentences.zh: 丁卯，在箕北，近漢，稍小，且去時，大如桃。

translations.literal: On dingmao day it was north of Basket, near Milky River, somewhat smaller, and when departing was as large as a peach.
translations.idiomatic: On dingmao day it was north of Basket, near Milky River, somewhat smaller, and when departing was as large as a peach.

translations.literal: On renshen day it disappeared, ten days in all.
translations.idiomatic: On renshen day it disappeared, ten days in all.

translations.literal: Divination said: "When fluffy star appears, there must be rebellious ministers.
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "When fluffy star appears, there must be rebellious ministers.

translations.literal: Between Fang and Heart is the Son of Heaven's palace."
translations.idiomatic: Between Fang and Heart is the Son of Heaven's palace."

sentences.zh: 是時梁王欲為漢嗣，使人殺漢爭臣袁盎。

translations.literal: At that time the King of Liang wanted to become Han heir and sent men to kill Han minister Yuan Ang.
translations.idiomatic: At that time the King of Liang wanted to become Han heir and sent men to kill Han minister Yuan Ang.

translations.literal: Han investigated and executed Liang's great ministers, using axe punishment.
translations.idiomatic: Han investigated and executed Liang's great ministers, using axe punishment.

sentences.zh: 梁王恐懼，布車入關，伏斧戉謝罪，然後得免。

translations.literal: The King of Liang was terrified, rode in plain carriage into the passes, submitted under axe and apologized, and only then was pardoned.
translations.idiomatic: The King of Liang was terrified, rode in plain carriage into the passes, submitted under axe and apologized, and only then was pardoned.

sentences.zh: 中三年十一月庚午夕，金、火合於虛，相去一寸。

translations.literal: In Zhong year three, eleventh month gengwu evening, Venus and Mars conjoined at Xu, one cun apart.
translations.idiomatic: In Zhong year three, eleventh month gengwu evening, Venus and Mars conjoined at Xu, one cun apart.

translations.literal: Divination said: "This is melting and mourning.
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "This is melting and mourning.

translations.literal: Xu corresponds to Qi."
translations.idiomatic: Xu corresponds to Qi."

sentences.zh: 四年四月丙申，金、木合於東井。

translations.literal: In year four, fourth month bingshen day, Venus and Jupiter conjoined at Eastern Well.
translations.idiomatic: In year four, fourth month bingshen day, Venus and Jupiter conjoined at Eastern Well.

translations.literal: Divination said: "This is an assembly in white clothing.
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "This is an assembly in white clothing.

translations.literal: Not so - it corresponds to Qin."
translations.idiomatic: Not so - it corresponds to Qin."

sentences.zh: 其五年四月乙巳，水、火合於參。

translations.literal: In year five, fourth month yisi day, Mercury and Mars conjoined at Shen.
translations.idiomatic: In year five, fourth month yisi day, Mercury and Mars conjoined at Shen.

translations.literal: Divination said: "The state is inauspicious.
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "The state is inauspicious.

translations.literal: Shen corresponds to Liang."
translations.idiomatic: Shen corresponds to Liang."

translations.literal: In year six, fourth month, King Xiao of Liang died.
translations.idiomatic: In year six, fourth month, King Xiao of Liang died.

translations.literal: In fifth month, Kings of Chengyang and Jiyin died.
translations.idiomatic: In fifth month, Kings of Chengyang and Jiyin died.

translations.literal: In sixth month, Princess Chengyang died.
translations.idiomatic: In sixth month, Princess Chengyang died.

sentences.zh: 出入三月，天子四衣白，臨邸第。

translations.literal: For three months entering and leaving, the Son of Heaven wore white mourning garments in four layers and visited mansions.
translations.idiomatic: For three months entering and leaving, the Son of Heaven wore white mourning garments in four layers and visited mansions.

sentences.zh: 孝武建元三年三月，有星孛於注、張，歷太微，干紫宮，至於天漢。

translations.literal: In Emperor Wu Jianyuan year three, third month, a broom star appeared in Yi and Zhang, passed through Taiwei, brushed the Purple Palace, and reached the Milky River.
translations.idiomatic: In Emperor Wu Jianyuan year three, third month, a broom star appeared in Yi and Zhang, passed through Taiwei, brushed the Purple Palace, and reached the Milky River.

sentences.zh: 春秋「星孛於北斗，齊、魯、晉之君皆將死亂」。

translations.literal: The Spring and Autumn says: "When a broom star appears at Northern Dipper, rulers of Qi, Lu, and Jin will all die in turmoil."
translations.idiomatic: The Spring and Autumn says: "When a broom star appears at Northern Dipper, rulers of Qi, Lu, and Jin will all die in turmoil."

sentences.zh: 今星孛歷五宿，其後濟東、膠西、江都王皆坐法削黜自殺，淮陽、衡山謀反而誅。

translations.literal: Now this broom star passed five lodges; afterward kings of Jidong, Jiaoxi, and Jiangdu were all stripped, deposed, or killed by law, and Huaiyang and Hengshan plotted rebellion and were executed.
translations.idiomatic: Now this broom star passed five lodges; afterward kings of Jidong, Jiaoxi, and Jiangdu were all stripped, deposed, or killed by law, and Huaiyang and Hengshan plotted rebellion and were executed.

sentences.zh: 三年四月，有星孛於天紀，至織女。

translations.literal: In year three, fourth month, a broom star appeared at Tianji and reached Weaving Maiden.
translations.idiomatic: In year three, fourth month, a broom star appeared at Tianji and reached Weaving Maiden.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「織女有女變，天紀為地震。」

translations.literal: Divination said: "At Weaving Maiden there is female disorder; at Tianji there is earthquake."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "At Weaving Maiden there is female disorder; at Tianji there is earthquake."

sentences.zh: 至四年十月而地動，其後陳皇后廢。

translations.literal: By year four, tenth month, there was earthquake; afterward Empress Chen was deposed.
translations.idiomatic: By year four, tenth month, there was earthquake; afterward Empress Chen was deposed.

translations.literal: In year six, Mars stationed at Carriage Ghosts.
translations.idiomatic: In year six, Mars stationed at Carriage Ghosts.

translations.literal: Divination said: "This is fire anomaly and mourning."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "This is fire anomaly and mourning."

sentences.zh: 是歲高園有火災，竇太后崩。

translations.literal: That year there was fire disaster at Gao park, and Empress Dowager Dou died.
translations.idiomatic: That year there was fire disaster at Gao park, and Empress Dowager Dou died.

sentences.zh: 元光元年六月，客星見于房。

translations.literal: In Yuanguang year one, sixth month, a guest star appeared at Fang.
translations.idiomatic: In Yuanguang year one, sixth month, a guest star appeared at Fang.

translations.literal: Divination said: "War will arise."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "War will arise."

sentences.zh: 其二年十一月，單于將十萬騎入武州，漢遣兵三十餘萬以待之。

translations.literal: In year two, eleventh month, the Chanyu led one hundred thousand cavalry into Wuzhou; Han dispatched over three hundred thousand troops to await them.
translations.idiomatic: In year two, eleventh month, the Chanyu led one hundred thousand cavalry into Wuzhou; Han dispatched over three hundred thousand troops to await them.

sentences.zh: 元光中，天星盡搖，上以問候星者。

translations.literal: In Yuanguang period, all heavenly stars shook, and the emperor asked star-watchers about it.
translations.idiomatic: In Yuanguang period, all heavenly stars shook, and the emperor asked star-watchers about it.

translations.literal: They replied: "When stars shake, the people are overworked."
translations.idiomatic: They replied: "When stars shake, the people are overworked."

sentences.zh: 後伐四夷，百姓勞于兵革。

translations.literal: Later, in campaigns against the four barbarians, the people were indeed exhausted by war.
translations.idiomatic: Later, in campaigns against the four barbarians, the people were indeed exhausted by war.

sentences.zh: 元鼎五年，太白入于天苑。

translations.literal: In Yuanding year five, Venus entered Heavenly Park.
translations.idiomatic: In Yuanding year five, Venus entered Heavenly Park.

translations.literal: Divination said: "Troops will rise through horses."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "Troops will rise through horses."

translations.literal: Another reading says:
translations.idiomatic: Another reading says:

translations.literal: "Horses in the army will die off."
translations.idiomatic: "Horses in the army will die off."

sentences.zh: 其後以天馬故誅大宛，馬大死於軍。

translations.literal: Afterward, because of the Heavenly Horses, Dayuan was attacked and many horses died in the campaign.
translations.idiomatic: Afterward, because of the Heavenly Horses, Dayuan was attacked and many horses died in the campaign.

translations.literal: In middle Yuanding, Mars stationed at Southern Dipper.
translations.idiomatic: In middle Yuanding, Mars stationed at Southern Dipper.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「熒惑所守，為亂賊喪兵；

translations.literal: Divination said: "Where Mars stations, there are rebels, mourning, and war.
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "Where Mars stations, there are rebels, mourning, and war.

translations.literal: If it stations long, that state's sacrifices are cut off.
translations.idiomatic: If it stations long, that state's sacrifices are cut off.

translations.literal: Southern Dipper belongs to Yue division."
translations.idiomatic: Southern Dipper belongs to Yue division."

sentences.zh: 其後越相呂嘉殺其王及太后，漢兵誅之，滅其國。

translations.literal: Afterward Yue Chancellor Lü Jia killed his king and queen mother; Han troops executed him and destroyed his state.
translations.idiomatic: Afterward Yue Chancellor Lü Jia killed his king and queen mother; Han troops executed him and destroyed his state.

translations.literal: In Yuanshi period, a broom star appeared at River Garrison.
translations.idiomatic: In Yuanshi period, a broom star appeared at River Garrison.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「南戍為越門，北戍為胡門。」

translations.literal: Divination said: "Southern garrison is Yue gate; northern garrison is Hu gate."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "Southern garrison is Yue gate; northern garrison is Hu gate."

sentences.zh: 其後漢兵擊拔朝鮮，以為樂浪、玄菟郡。

translations.literal: Afterward Han troops attacked and took Joseon, establishing Lelang and Xuantu commanderies.
translations.idiomatic: Afterward Han troops attacked and took Joseon, establishing Lelang and Xuantu commanderies.

translations.literal: Joseon lies by the sea, thus has Yue characteristics.
translations.idiomatic: Joseon lies by the sea, thus has Yue characteristics.

translations.literal: Yet it is in the north, thus within Hu domain.
translations.idiomatic: Yet it is in the north, thus within Hu domain.

translations.literal: In Taichu period, a broom star appeared at Zhaoyao.
translations.idiomatic: In Taichu period, a broom star appeared at Zhaoyao.

sentences.zh: 傳曰：「客星守招搖，蠻夷有亂，民死君。」

translations.literal: Tradition says: "If a guest star guards Zhaoyao, among distant barbarians there is disorder, and people kill their ruler."
translations.idiomatic: Tradition says: "If a guest star guards Zhaoyao, among distant barbarians there is disorder, and people kill their ruler."

sentences.zh: 其後漢兵擊大宛，斬其王。

translations.literal: Afterward Han troops attacked Dayuan and beheaded its king.
translations.idiomatic: Afterward Han troops attacked Dayuan and beheaded its king.

translations.literal: Zhaoyao belongs to distant barbarian division.
translations.idiomatic: Zhaoyao belongs to distant barbarian division.

sentences.zh: 孝昭始元中，漢宦者梁成恢及燕王候星者吳莫如見蓬星出西方天市東門，行過河鼓，入營室中。

translations.literal: In Emperor Zhao's Shiyuan period, the Han eunuch Liang Chenghui and Wu Moru, a star-watcher for the King of Yan, saw a fluffy star emerge west at the east gate of Heavenly Market, pass River Drum, and enter Yingshi.
translations.idiomatic: In Emperor Zhao's Shiyuan period, the Han eunuch Liang Chenghui and Wu Moru, a star-watcher for the King of Yan, saw a fluffy star emerge west at the east gate of Heavenly Market, pass River Drum, and enter Yingshi.

sentences.zh: 恢曰：「蓬星出六十日，不出三年，下有亂臣戮死於市。」

translations.literal: Hui said: "A fluffy star that appears sixty days, and not reappearing within three years, means below it there will be rebellious ministers executed in market."
translations.idiomatic: Hui said: "A fluffy star that appears sixty days, and not reappearing within three years, means below it there will be rebellious ministers executed in market."

sentences.zh: 後太白出西方，下行一舍，復上行二舍而下去。

translations.literal: Afterward Venus appeared in west, moved down one lodge, then up two lodges and down again.
translations.idiomatic: Afterward Venus appeared in west, moved down one lodge, then up two lodges and down again.

sentences.zh: 太白主兵，上復下，將有戮死者。

translations.literal: Venus governs war; rising then falling means there will be those executed.
translations.idiomatic: Venus governs war; rising then falling means there will be those executed.

sentences.zh: 後太白出東方，入咸池，東下入東井。

translations.literal: Later Venus appeared east, entered Xianchi, then descended east into Eastern Well.
translations.idiomatic: Later Venus appeared east, entered Xianchi, then descended east into Eastern Well.

translations.literal: This means ministers are disloyal and someone plots against the ruler above.
translations.idiomatic: This means ministers are disloyal and someone plots against the ruler above.

sentences.zh: 後太白入太微西藩第一星，北出東藩第一星，北東下去。

translations.literal: Later Venus entered first star of west fence in Taiwei, emerged north from first star of east fence, then moved down northeast.
translations.idiomatic: Later Venus entered first star of west fence in Taiwei, emerged north from first star of east fence, then moved down northeast.

sentences.zh: 太微者，天廷也，太白行其中，宮門當閉，大將被甲兵，邪臣伏誅。

translations.literal: Taiwei is the heavenly court; when Venus moves within it, palace gates should be shut, great generals armored, and wicked ministers secretly executed.
translations.idiomatic: Taiwei is the heavenly court; when Venus moves within it, palace gates should be shut, great generals armored, and wicked ministers secretly executed.

sentences.zh: 熒惑在婁，逆行至奎，法曰「當有兵」。

translations.literal: Mars at Lou retrograded to Kui; the rule says "there should be war."
translations.idiomatic: Mars at Lou retrograded to Kui; the rule says "there should be war."

translations.literal: Afterward Venus entered Mao.
translations.idiomatic: Afterward Venus entered Mao.

sentences.zh: 莫如曰：「蓬星出西方，當有大臣戮死者。

translations.literal: Moru said: "Fluffy star appearing in west means there will be high ministers executed.
translations.idiomatic: Moru said: "Fluffy star appearing in west means there will be high ministers executed.

sentences.zh: 太白星入東井、太微廷，出東門，漢有死將。」

translations.literal: Venus entering Eastern Well and Taiwei court, emerging by east gate, means Han will lose a general."
translations.idiomatic: Venus entering Eastern Well and Taiwei court, emerging by east gate, means Han will lose a general."

translations.literal: Later Mars emerged in east and guarded Venus.
translations.idiomatic: Later Mars emerged in east and guarded Venus.

translations.literal: War should rise, and host side will not win.
translations.idiomatic: War should rise, and host side will not win.

sentences.zh: 後流星下燕萬載宮極，東去，法曰「國恐，有誅」。

translations.literal: Later a meteor fell at Yan's Wanzai Palace pole and went east; the rule says "the state is in peril; there will be executions."
translations.idiomatic: Later a meteor fell at Yan's Wanzai Palace pole and went east; the rule says "the state is in peril; there will be executions."

sentences.zh: 其後左將軍桀、票騎將軍安與長公主、燕剌王謀亂，咸伏其辜。

translations.literal: Afterward Left General Jie and Cavalry General An, with the Eldest Princess and Prince of Yan, plotted disorder and all paid the penalty.
translations.idiomatic: Afterward Left General Jie and Cavalry General An, with the Eldest Princess and Prince of Yan, plotted disorder and all paid the penalty.

translations.literal: Troops then punished the Wuhuan.
translations.idiomatic: Troops then punished the Wuhuan.

sentences.zh: 元鳳四年九月，客星在紫宮中斗樞極間。

translations.literal: In Yuanfeng year four, ninth month, a guest star was in Purple Palace between Dipper pivot and Pole.
translations.idiomatic: In Yuanfeng year four, ninth month, a guest star was in Purple Palace between Dipper pivot and Pole.

translations.literal: Divination said: "War."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "War."

sentences.zh: 其五年六月，發三輔郡國少年詣北軍。

translations.literal: In year five, sixth month, youths from Three Auxiliaries and commanderies were conscripted to northern army.
translations.idiomatic: In year five, sixth month, youths from Three Auxiliaries and commanderies were conscripted to northern army.

sentences.zh: 五年四月，燭星見奎、婁間。

translations.literal: In year five, fourth month, Torch Star appeared between Kui and Lou.
translations.idiomatic: In year five, fourth month, Torch Star appeared between Kui and Lou.

sentences.zh: 占曰「有土功，胡人死，邊城和。」

translations.literal: Divination said: "There will be earthworks, Hu people die, and frontier cities become pacified."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "There will be earthworks, Hu people die, and frontier cities become pacified."

sentences.zh: 其六年正月，築遼東、玄菟城。

translations.literal: In year six, first month, Liaodong and Xuantu cities were built.
translations.idiomatic: In year six, first month, Liaodong and Xuantu cities were built.

sentences.zh: 二月，度遼將軍范明友擊烏桓還。

translations.literal: In second month, General Crossing Liao, Fan Mingyou, attacked Wuhuan and returned.
translations.idiomatic: In second month, General Crossing Liao, Fan Mingyou, attacked Wuhuan and returned.

sentences.zh: 元平元年正月庚子，日出時有黑雲，狀如焱風亂鬊，轉出西北，東南行，轉而西，有頃亡。

translations.literal: In Yuanping year one, first month gengzi day at sunrise, there was black cloud shaped like blazing wind and tangled hair, turning out to northwest, moving southeast, then turning west, and vanishing after a while.
translations.idiomatic: In Yuanping year one, first month gengzi day at sunrise, there was black cloud shaped like blazing wind and tangled hair, turning out to northwest, moving southeast, then turning west, and vanishing after a while.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「有雲如眾風，是謂風師，法有大兵。」

translations.literal: Divination said: "Cloud like many winds is called Wind Master; by rule there is major military action."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "Cloud like many winds is called Wind Master; by rule there is major military action."

sentences.zh: 其後兵起烏孫，五將征匈奴。

translations.literal: Afterward warfare arose in Wusun, and five generals campaigned against Xiongnu.
translations.idiomatic: Afterward warfare arose in Wusun, and five generals campaigned against Xiongnu.

sentences.zh: 二月甲申，晨有大星如月，有眾星隨而西行。

translations.literal: On jiashen day of second month at dawn, there was a great star like moon, with many stars following westward.
translations.idiomatic: On jiashen day of second month at dawn, there was a great star like moon, with many stars following westward.

sentences.zh: 乙酉，牂雲如狗，赤色，長尾三枚，夾漢西行。

translations.literal: On yiyou, a can-cloud like a dog, red, with three long tails, flanking the Milky River and moving west.
translations.idiomatic: On yiyou, a can-cloud like a dog, red, with three long tails, flanking the Milky River and moving west.

sentences.zh: 大星如月，大臣之象，眾星隨之，眾皆隨從也。

translations.literal: A great star like moon signifies a high minister; many stars following mean many followers obey him.
translations.idiomatic: A great star like moon signifies a high minister; many stars following mean many followers obey him.

sentences.zh: 天文以東行為順，西行為逆，此大臣欲行權以安社稷。

translations.literal: In celestial rule, eastward motion is regular and westward reverse; this means the high minister seeks to wield power to stabilize the altars.
translations.idiomatic: In celestial rule, eastward motion is regular and westward reverse; this means the high minister seeks to wield power to stabilize the altars.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「太白散為天狗，為卒起。

translations.literal: Divination says: "Venus scattered becomes Heavenly Dog, meaning sudden uprising.
translations.idiomatic: Divination says: "Venus scattered becomes Heavenly Dog, meaning sudden uprising.

translations.literal: When sudden uprising appears, calamity has no fixed time, and ministers hold the handle of power.
translations.idiomatic: When sudden uprising appears, calamity has no fixed time, and ministers hold the handle of power.

translations.literal: Can-cloud means ruler-disorder."
translations.idiomatic: Can-cloud means ruler-disorder."

sentences.zh: 到其四月，昌邑王賀行淫辟，立二十七日，大將軍霍光白皇太后廢賀。

translations.literal: By that fourth month, King He of Changyi behaved licentiously and perversely; after 27 days on throne, Grand General Huo Guang petitioned the Empress Dowager and deposed He.
translations.idiomatic: By that fourth month, King He of Changyi behaved licentiously and perversely; after 27 days on throne, Grand General Huo Guang petitioned the Empress Dowager and deposed He.

sentences.zh: 三月丙戌，流星出翼、軫東北，干太微，入紫宮。

translations.literal: On bingxu day of third month, a meteor emerged northeast of Yi and Zhen, brushed Taiwei, and entered Purple Palace.
translations.idiomatic: On bingxu day of third month, a meteor emerged northeast of Yi and Zhen, brushed Taiwei, and entered Purple Palace.

translations.literal: It began small and grew larger as it entered, with light.
translations.idiomatic: It began small and grew larger as it entered, with light.

translations.literal: Shortly after entry, its sound was like thunder, roaring three times then stopping.
translations.idiomatic: Shortly after entry, its sound was like thunder, roaring three times then stopping.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「流星入紫宮，天下大凶。」

translations.literal: Divination said: "A meteor entering Purple Palace is great inauspice under heaven."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "A meteor entering Purple Palace is great inauspice under heaven."

translations.literal: On guiwei day of fourth month, the imperial carriage was mournfully stilled.
translations.idiomatic: On guiwei day of fourth month, the imperial carriage was mournfully stilled.

sentences.zh: 黃龍元年三月，客星居王梁東北可九尺，長丈餘，西指，出閣道間，至紫宮。

translations.literal: In Huanglong year one, third month, a guest star was northeast of Wangliang by about nine chi, over one zhang long, pointing west, emerging between Pavilion Roads and reaching Purple Palace.
translations.idiomatic: In Huanglong year one, third month, a guest star was northeast of Wangliang by about nine chi, over one zhang long, pointing west, emerging between Pavilion Roads and reaching Purple Palace.

translations.literal: That twelfth month, the imperial carriage was mournfully stilled.
translations.idiomatic: That twelfth month, the imperial carriage was mournfully stilled.

sentences.zh: 元帝初元元年四月，客星大如瓜，色青白，在南斗第二星東可四尺。

translations.literal: In Emperor Yuan Chuyuan year one, fourth month, a guest star as large as a melon, blue-white, appeared four chi east of the second star of Southern Dipper.
translations.idiomatic: In Emperor Yuan Chuyuan year one, fourth month, a guest star as large as a melon, blue-white, appeared four chi east of the second star of Southern Dipper.

translations.literal: Divination said: "Flood and famine."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "Flood and famine."

translations.literal: In fifth month, Bohai waters greatly overflowed.
translations.idiomatic: In fifth month, Bohai waters greatly overflowed.

sentences.zh: 六月，關東大飢，民多餓死，琅邪郡人相食。

translations.literal: In sixth month, Guandong had great famine; many people starved; in Langya people ate one another.
translations.idiomatic: In sixth month, Guandong had great famine; many people starved; in Langya people ate one another.

sentences.zh: 二年五月，客星見昴分，居卷舌東可五尺，青白色，炎長三寸。

translations.literal: In year two, fifth month, a guest star appeared in Mao division, five chi east of Coiled Tongue, blue-white, with a three-cun glowing tail.
translations.idiomatic: In year two, fifth month, a guest star appeared in Mao division, five chi east of Coiled Tongue, blue-white, with a three-cun glowing tail.

translations.literal: Divination said: "There are people under heaven spreading false words."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "There are people under heaven spreading false words."

sentences.zh: 其十二月，鉅鹿都尉謝君男詐為神人，論死，父免官。

translations.literal: That twelfth month, Commandant Xie Junnan of Julu falsely posed as a spirit-man; he was sentenced to death and his father dismissed.
translations.idiomatic: That twelfth month, Commandant Xie Junnan of Julu falsely posed as a spirit-man; he was sentenced to death and his father dismissed.

sentences.zh: 五年四月，彗星出西北，赤黃色，長八尺所，後數日長丈餘，東北指，在參分。

translations.literal: In year five, fourth month, a comet emerged northwest, red-yellow, about eight chi long; after several days over one zhang, pointing northeast, in Shen division.
translations.idiomatic: In year five, fourth month, a comet emerged northwest, red-yellow, about eight chi long; after several days over one zhang, pointing northeast, in Shen division.

translations.literal: Over two years later, Western Qiang rebelled.
translations.idiomatic: Over two years later, Western Qiang rebelled.

sentences.zh: 孝成建始元年九月戊子，有流星出文昌，色白，光燭地，長可四丈，大一圍，動搖如龍蛇形。

translations.literal: In Emperor Cheng Jianshi year one, ninth month wuzu day, a meteor emerged from Wenchang, white, illuminating the ground, about four zhang long, one encirclement thick, swaying like dragon-snake form.
translations.idiomatic: In Emperor Cheng Jianshi year one, ninth month wuzu day, a meteor emerged from Wenchang, white, illuminating the ground, about four zhang long, one encirclement thick, swaying like dragon-snake form.

sentences.zh: 有頃，長可五六丈，大四圍所，詘折委曲，貫紫宮西，在斗西北子亥間。

translations.literal: After a while it lengthened to five or six zhang, about four circles thick, bent and winding, passed through west of Purple Palace, between Zi and Hai northwest of the Dipper.
translations.idiomatic: After a while it lengthened to five or six zhang, about four circles thick, bent and winding, passed through west of Purple Palace, between Zi and Hai northwest of the Dipper.

sentences.zh: 後詘如環，北方不合，留一合所。

translations.literal: Then it bent like a ring, unclosed in north, leaving one gap.
translations.idiomatic: Then it bent like a ring, unclosed in north, leaving one gap.

translations.literal: Divination said: "Wenchang signifies upper generals and noble chancellors."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "Wenchang signifies upper generals and noble chancellors."

sentences.zh: 是時帝舅王鳳為大將軍，其後宣帝舅子王商為丞相，皆貴重任政。

translations.literal: At that time the emperor's maternal uncle Wang Feng was Grand General; later another uncle's son Wang Shang became chancellor; both were highly honored and held government power.
translations.idiomatic: At that time the emperor's maternal uncle Wang Feng was Grand General; later another uncle's son Wang Shang became chancellor; both were highly honored and held government power.

translations.literal: Feng envied Shang, slandered him, and removed him.
translations.idiomatic: Feng envied Shang, slandered him, and removed him.

translations.literal: Shang killed himself; his relatives were all deposed and dismissed.
translations.idiomatic: Shang killed himself; his relatives were all deposed and dismissed.

sentences.zh: 四年七月，熒惑隃歲星，居其東北半寸所如連李。

translations.literal: In year four, seventh month, Mars overtook Jupiter, residing half cun northeast of it, like linked plums.
translations.idiomatic: In year four, seventh month, Mars overtook Jupiter, residing half cun northeast of it, like linked plums.

sentences.zh: 時歲星在關星西四尺所，熒惑初從畢口大星東東北往，數日至，往疾去遲。

translations.literal: At that time Jupiter was four chi west of Guan star; Mars first moved east-northeast from the great star at Bi mouth, reached it after several days, with fast approach and slow departure.
translations.idiomatic: At that time Jupiter was four chi west of Guan star; Mars first moved east-northeast from the great star at Bi mouth, reached it after several days, with fast approach and slow departure.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「熒惑與歲星鬥，有病君飢歲。」

translations.literal: Divination said: "When Mars contends with Jupiter, there is ruler illness and famine year."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "When Mars contends with Jupiter, there is ruler illness and famine year."

sentences.zh: 至河平元年三月，旱，傷麥，民食榆皮。

translations.literal: By Heping year one, third month, drought damaged wheat and people ate elm bark.
translations.idiomatic: By Heping year one, third month, drought damaged wheat and people ate elm bark.

sentences.zh: 二年十二月壬申，太皇太后避時昆明東觀。

translations.literal: In year two, twelfth month renshen day, Grand Empress Dowager avoided the season at eastern pavilion of Kunming.
translations.idiomatic: In year two, twelfth month renshen day, Grand Empress Dowager avoided the season at eastern pavilion of Kunming.

sentences.zh: 十一月乙卯，月食填星，星不見，時在輿鬼西北八九尺所。

translations.literal: On yimao day of eleventh month, moon eclipsed Saturn; Saturn was unseen, then at about eight or nine chi northwest of Carriage Ghosts.
translations.idiomatic: On yimao day of eleventh month, moon eclipsed Saturn; Saturn was unseen, then at about eight or nine chi northwest of Carriage Ghosts.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「月食填星，流民千里。」

translations.literal: Divination said: "When moon eclipses Saturn, migrants flow a thousand li."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "When moon eclipses Saturn, migrants flow a thousand li."

sentences.zh: 河平元年三月，流民入函谷關。

translations.literal: In Heping year one, third month, migrants entered Hangu Pass.
translations.idiomatic: In Heping year one, third month, migrants entered Hangu Pass.

sentences.zh: 河平二年十月下旬，填星在東井軒轅南耑大星尺餘，歲星在其西北尺所，熒惑在其西北二尺所，皆從西方來。

translations.literal: In late tenth month of Heping year two, Saturn was over one chi south of the great southern tip star of Xuanyuan in Eastern Well; Jupiter was about one chi northwest of it; Mars about two chi northwest; all came from west.
translations.idiomatic: In late tenth month of Heping year two, Saturn was over one chi south of the great southern tip star of Xuanyuan in Eastern Well; Jupiter was about one chi northwest of it; Mars about two chi northwest; all came from west.

sentences.zh: 填星貫輿鬼，先到歲星次，熒惑亦貫輿鬼。

translations.literal: Saturn crossed Carriage Ghosts, reaching Jupiter's lodge first; Mars also crossed Carriage Ghosts.
translations.idiomatic: Saturn crossed Carriage Ghosts, reaching Jupiter's lodge first; Mars also crossed Carriage Ghosts.

sentences.zh: 十一月上旬，歲星、熒惑西去填星，皆西北逆行。

translations.literal: In early eleventh month, Jupiter and Mars moved west away from Saturn, both retrograding northwest.
translations.idiomatic: In early eleventh month, Jupiter and Mars moved west away from Saturn, both retrograding northwest.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「三星若合，是謂驚位，是謂絕行，外內有兵與喪，改立王公。」

translations.literal: Divination said: "If three stars seem conjoined, this is called startled station, called broken movement; there are armies and mourning within and without, and kings and nobles are replaced."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "If three stars seem conjoined, this is called startled station, called broken movement; there are armies and mourning within and without, and kings and nobles are replaced."

sentences.zh: 其十一月丁巳，夜郎王歆大逆不道，牂柯太守立捕殺歆。

translations.literal: On ding-si day of that eleventh month, King Xin of Yelang committed great rebellion and lawlessness; governor of Zangke set up pursuit and killed Xin.
translations.idiomatic: On ding-si day of that eleventh month, King Xin of Yelang committed great rebellion and lawlessness; governor of Zangke set up pursuit and killed Xin.

sentences.zh: 三年九月甲戌，東郡莊平男子侯母辟兄弟五人群黨為盜，攻燔官寺，縛縣長吏，盜取印綬，自稱將軍。

translations.literal: In year three, ninth month jiaxu day, men of Dong commandery led by Hou Mubi and his five brothers formed a gang as bandits, attacked and burned offices, bound county officials, seized seals and cords, and called themselves generals.
translations.idiomatic: In year three, ninth month jiaxu day, men of Dong commandery led by Hou Mubi and his five brothers formed a gang as bandits, attacked and burned offices, bound county officials, seized seals and cords, and called themselves generals.

sentences.zh: 三月辛卯，左將軍千秋卒，右將軍史丹為左將軍。

translations.literal: On xinmao day of third month, Left General Qianqiu died; Right General Shi Dan became Left General.
translations.idiomatic: On xinmao day of third month, Left General Qianqiu died; Right General Shi Dan became Left General.

sentences.zh: 四年四月戊申，梁王賀薨。

translations.literal: In year four, fourth month wushen day, King He of Liang died.
translations.idiomatic: In year four, fourth month wushen day, King He of Liang died.

sentences.zh: 四夫閏月庚午，飛星大如缶，出西南，入斗下。

translations.literal: In intercalary month gengwu day, a flying star as large as a jar emerged southwest and entered below Dipper.
translations.idiomatic: In intercalary month gengwu day, a flying star as large as a jar emerged southwest and entered below Dipper.

translations.literal: Divination said: "Han will send an envoy to Xiongnu."
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: "Han will send an envoy to Xiongnu."

sentences.zh: 明年，鴻嘉元年正月，匈奴單于雕陶莫皋死。

translations.literal: In following year, Hongjia year one first month, Xiongnu Chanyu Diaotao Mogao died.
translations.idiomatic: In following year, Hongjia year one first month, Xiongnu Chanyu Diaotao Mogao died.

sentences.zh: 五月甲午，遣中郎將楊興使弔。

translations.literal: On jiamao day of fifth month, Central Gentleman General Yang Xing was sent as envoy of condolence.
translations.idiomatic: On jiamao day of fifth month, Central Gentleman General Yang Xing was sent as envoy of condolence.

sentences.zh: 永始二年二月癸未夜，東方有赤色，大三四圍，長二三丈，索索如樹，南方有大四五圍，下行十餘丈，皆不至地滅。

translations.literal: On guimei night of second month, Yongshi year two, in the east there was red qi, three to four circumferences broad and two to three zhang long, rustling like trees; in the south another was four to five circumferences broad, descending over ten zhang; both vanished before reaching ground.
translations.idiomatic: On guimei night of second month, Yongshi year two, in the east there was red qi, three to four circumferences broad and two to three zhang long, rustling like trees; in the south another was four to five circumferences broad, descending over ten zhang; both vanished before reaching ground.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「東方客之變氣，狀如樹木，以此知四方欲動者。」

translations.literal: Divination said: 'This is anomalous qi from eastern guests, shaped like trees; by it one knows the four directions are about to stir.'
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: 'This is anomalous qi from eastern guests, shaped like trees; by it one knows the four directions are about to stir.'

sentences.zh: 明年十二月己卯，尉氏男子樊並等謀反，賊殺陳留太守嚴普及吏民，出囚徒，取庫兵，劫略令丞，自稱將軍，皆誅死。

translations.literal: In the next year's twelfth month, jimao day, Fan Bing of Weishi and others plotted rebellion, murdered Chenliu governor Yan Pu and officials and civilians, released prisoners, seized arsenal weapons, kidnapped magistrates and assistants, called themselves generals, and were all executed.
translations.idiomatic: In the next year's twelfth month, jimao day, Fan Bing of Weishi and others plotted rebellion, murdered Chenliu governor Yan Pu and officials and civilians, released prisoners, seized arsenal weapons, kidnapped magistrates and assistants, called themselves generals, and were all executed.

sentences.zh: 庚子，山陽鐵官亡徒蘇令等殺傷吏民，篡出囚徒，取庫兵，聚黨數百人為大賊，踰年經歷郡國四十餘。

translations.literal: On gengzi day, escaped convicts from Shanyang iron office under Su Ling killed and wounded officials and people, broke out prisoners, seized arsenal weapons, gathered hundreds as major bandits, and over more than a year moved through over forty commanderies and kingdoms.
translations.idiomatic: On gengzi day, escaped convicts from Shanyang iron office under Su Ling killed and wounded officials and people, broke out prisoners, seized arsenal weapons, gathered hundreds as major bandits, and over more than a year moved through over forty commanderies and kingdoms.

sentences.zh: 一日有兩氣同時起，並見，而並、令等同月俱發也。

translations.literal: That one day two qi phenomena arose together and were seen together, matching that Bing and Ling also launched in the same month.
translations.idiomatic: That one day two qi phenomena arose together and were seen together, matching that Bing and Ling also launched in the same month.

sentences.zh: 元延元年四月丁酉日餔時，天蛲晏，殷殷如雷聲，有流星頭大如缶，長十餘丈，皎然赤白色，從日下東南去。

translations.literal: At feeding time on dingyou day of fourth month, Yuanyan year one, heaven was darkened; booming sounds like thunder, and a meteor with a head as large as a jar and over ten zhang long, bright red-white, flew southeast from below the sun.
translations.idiomatic: At feeding time on dingyou day of fourth month, Yuanyan year one, heaven was darkened; booming sounds like thunder, and a meteor with a head as large as a jar and over ten zhang long, bright red-white, flew southeast from below the sun.

sentences.zh: 四面或大如盂，或如雞子，燿燿如雨下，至昏止。

translations.literal: On all sides, some fragments were as large as basins, some like eggs, glittering like rain, and stopped by dusk.
translations.idiomatic: On all sides, some fragments were as large as basins, some like eggs, glittering like rain, and stopped by dusk.

translations.literal: All commanderies and kingdoms reported falling stars.
translations.idiomatic: All commanderies and kingdoms reported falling stars.

sentences.zh: 春秋星隕如雨為王者失勢諸侯起伯之異也。

translations.literal: In Spring and Autumn interpretation, stars falling like rain is anomaly that ruler loses power and feudal lords rise as hegemons.
translations.idiomatic: In Spring and Autumn interpretation, stars falling like rain is anomaly that ruler loses power and feudal lords rise as hegemons.

translations.literal: Afterward Wang Mang gradually seized the state's handles of power.
translations.idiomatic: Afterward Wang Mang gradually seized the state's handles of power.

sentences.zh: 王氏之興萌於成帝，是以有星隕之變。

translations.literal: The rise of the Wang clan began under Emperor Cheng; therefore there was this meteor-fall anomaly.
translations.idiomatic: The rise of the Wang clan began under Emperor Cheng; therefore there was this meteor-fall anomaly.

translations.literal: Later Mang usurped the state.
translations.idiomatic: Later Mang usurped the state.

sentences.zh: 綏和元年正月辛未，有流星從東南入北斗，長數十丈，二刻所息。

translations.literal: In Suihe year one, first month xinwei, a meteor entered the Northern Dipper from southeast, tens of zhang long, and ceased after about two ke.
translations.idiomatic: In Suihe year one, first month xinwei, a meteor entered the Northern Dipper from southeast, tens of zhang long, and ceased after about two ke.

translations.literal: Divination said: 'A great minister will be arrested.'
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: 'A great minister will be arrested.'

sentences.zh: 其年十一月庚子，定陵侯淳于長坐執左道下獄死。

translations.literal: That year in eleventh month gengzi, Marquis of Dingling Chunyu Zhang was imprisoned for heterodox practices and died in prison.
translations.idiomatic: That year in eleventh month gengzi, Marquis of Dingling Chunyu Zhang was imprisoned for heterodox practices and died in prison.

translations.literal: In spring of year two, Mars stationed at Heart.
translations.idiomatic: In spring of year two, Mars stationed at Heart.

sentences.zh: 二月乙丑，丞相翟方進欲塞災異，自殺。

translations.literal: On yichou day of second month, Chancellor Zhai Fangjin, seeking to block ominous portents, killed himself.
translations.idiomatic: On yichou day of second month, Chancellor Zhai Fangjin, seeking to block ominous portents, killed himself.

translations.literal: On bingxu day of second month, the imperial carriage was mournfully stilled.
translations.idiomatic: On bingxu day of second month, the imperial carriage was mournfully stilled.

sentences.zh: 哀帝建平元年正月丁未日出時，有著天白氣，廣如一匹布，長十餘丈，西南行，讙如雷，西南行一刻而止，名曰天狗。

translations.literal: At sunrise on dingwei day of first month, Jianping year one under Emperor Ai, a white qi band attached to heaven appeared, as broad as one bolt of cloth and over ten zhang long, moving southwest with thunder-like roar; after one ke it stopped, called Heavenly Dog.
translations.idiomatic: At sunrise on dingwei day of first month, Jianping year one under Emperor Ai, a white qi band attached to heaven appeared, as broad as one bolt of cloth and over ten zhang long, moving southwest with thunder-like roar; after one ke it stopped, called Heavenly Dog.

sentences.zh: 傳曰：「言之不從，則有犬禍詩妖。」

translations.literal: Tradition says: 'When words are not heeded, there are canine calamities and poetic prodigies.'
translations.idiomatic: Tradition says: 'When words are not heeded, there are canine calamities and poetic prodigies.'

sentences.zh: 到其四年正月、二月、三月，民相驚動，讙譁奔走，傳行詔籌祠西王母，又曰「從目人當來」。

translations.literal: By first, second, and third months of year four, the people panicked and ran noisily, spreading forged edicts and tally notices to sacrifice to Queen Mother of the West, and saying 'the one with vertical eyes will come.'
translations.idiomatic: By first, second, and third months of year four, the people panicked and ran noisily, spreading forged edicts and tally notices to sacrifice to Queen Mother of the West, and saying 'the one with vertical eyes will come.'

sentences.zh: 十二月，白氣出西南，從地上至天，出參下，貫天廁，廣如一疋布，長十餘丈，十餘日去。

translations.literal: In twelfth month, white qi emerged southwest, rising from ground to heaven, beneath Shen, piercing Heavenly Latrine, as broad as one bolt and over ten zhang long; it remained over ten days and departed.
translations.idiomatic: In twelfth month, white qi emerged southwest, rising from ground to heaven, beneath Shen, piercing Heavenly Latrine, as broad as one bolt and over ten zhang long; it remained over ten days and departed.

translations.literal: Divination said: 'The Son of Heaven has hidden illness.'
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: 'The Son of Heaven has hidden illness.'

sentences.zh: 其三年十一月壬子，太皇太后詔曰：「皇帝寬仁孝順，奉承聖緒，靡有解怠，而久病未瘳。

translations.literal: In third year, eleventh month renzi, the Grand Empress Dowager issued edict: 'The emperor is broad and benevolent, filial and compliant, carrying on sacred succession without slackness, yet long unhealed from illness.
translations.idiomatic: In third year, eleventh month renzi, the Grand Empress Dowager issued edict: 'The emperor is broad and benevolent, filial and compliant, carrying on sacred succession without slackness, yet long unhealed from illness.

sentences.zh: 夙夜惟思，殆繼體之君不宜改作。

translations.literal: Day and night I think only this: perhaps a ruler inheriting the body should not alter institutions.
translations.idiomatic: Day and night I think only this: perhaps a ruler inheriting the body should not alter institutions.

sentences.zh: 春秋大復古，其復甘泉泰畤、汾陰后土如故。」

translations.literal: The Spring and Autumn greatly values restoring antiquity; restore Ganquan Tai altar and Fenyin Houtu as before.'
translations.idiomatic: The Spring and Autumn greatly values restoring antiquity; restore Ganquan Tai altar and Fenyin Houtu as before.'

sentences.zh: 元壽元年十一月，歲星入太微，逆行干右執法。

translations.literal: In Yuanshou year one, eleventh month, Jupiter entered Taiwei and retrograded, striking Right Enforcer of Law.
translations.idiomatic: In Yuanshou year one, eleventh month, Jupiter entered Taiwei and retrograded, striking Right Enforcer of Law.

sentences.zh: 占曰：「大臣有憂，執法者誅，若有罪。」

translations.literal: Divination said: 'A great minister has anxiety; the law enforcer will be executed, or one guilty will be punished.'
translations.idiomatic: Divination said: 'A great minister has anxiety; the law enforcer will be executed, or one guilty will be punished.'

sentences.zh: 二年十月戊寅，高安侯董賢免大司馬位，歸第自殺。

translations.literal: In year two, on wuyin day of tenth month, Marquis of Gao'an Dong Xian was removed from Grand Marshal post, returned to his residence, and killed himself.
translations.idiomatic: In year two, on wuyin day of tenth month, Marquis of Gao'an Dong Xian was removed from Grand Marshal post, returned to his residence, and killed himself.
